specific_mechanism: Mohs scale ranks materials by scratch test; ordinal scale not linear; correlates roughly with absolute hardness but exhibits gaps
llm_application: LLM capability ranking via pairwise comparison: ordinal scale by 'scratches harder than' relation between models; reveals capability gaps despite continuous scaling laws.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes gemology spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
